defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2003 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: A variety of commercially produced postcards and greeting cards for the occassion of Valentine's Day, February 14. Included are clapsaddle postcards (one with a girl making a quilt reads "St. Valentine's Greeting, Woman's sphere is in the home"); three-dimensional German cards from the early 1900's; and valentines from the 1960's through 1980 saved by Gladys Coughlan, a woman in Alberta, Canada.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: A variety of commercially produced postcards and greeting cards for the occassion of Valentine's Day, February 14. Included are clapsaddle postcards (one with a girl making a quilt reads "St. Valentine's Greeting, Woman's sphere is in the home"); three-dimensional German cards from the early 1900's; and valentines from the 1960's through 1980 saved by Gladys Coughlan, a woman in Alberta, Canada.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Related collection: Photographs and postcards of women collection, #7678.
Related collection: Photographs and postcards of gender collection, #7717.

did.unittitle: Martha Stewart Living, Valentine's Day issue,

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Valentine collection, #7718. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
